name: primitive_string_number_noninteger_now_claimed
description: Phase 7C CLAIMED (number-display parity closed): string target, JSON 5e0. BAML's jsonish::Value::Number stores serde_json f64 and Display CANONICALIZES the spelling (5e0 -> "5.0"). native now reproduces serde's f64 Display byte-exact (displayFloat64: ryu shortest round-trip, LIVE-CAPTURED 0-mismatch over 2060 finals), so it CLAIMS this with no BAML fallback. want is BAML's canonical serde f64 Display.
